title: Section 48C
content: 1[48C. Revocation of the settlement or commitment order and penalty.--If an applicant fails to comply with the order passed under section 48A or section 48B or it comes to the notice of the Commission that the applicant has not made full and true disclosure or there has been a material change in the facts, the order passed under section 48A or section 48B, as the case may be, shall stand revoked and withdrawn and such enterprise shall be liable to pay legal costs incurred by the Commission which may extend to rupees one crore and the Commission may restore or initiate the inquiry in respect of which the order under section 48A or section 48B was passed.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 9 of 2023, s. 35, for section 48 (w.e.f. 6-3-2024).
